batchSize.description: The number of training samples processed together in one iteration. Larger batch sizes can improve training stability and speed but require more memory. Default is 1.

epochCount.description: The number of iterations through the entire training dataset. Default is 2. Larger datasets require fewer epochs, smaller datasets require more.

learningRate.description: The rate at which model parameters are updated after each batch. Higher values may speed convergence but risk training instability.

learningRateWarmupSteps.description: Number of iterations over which learning rate gradually increases. Recommended: dataset_size / 640 for Nova Micro, / 160 for Nova Lite, / 320 for Nova Pro. Avoid large values for small datasets.
